scripts.dev:full: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --persist-to .wrangler/state
scripts.db:seed:local: npx wrangler d1 execute bondfire-local --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=./db/schema.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute bondfire-local --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=./db/migrations/2026-01-01_local_bootstrap_missing_tables.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute bondfire-local --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=./db/migrations/2026-01-02_local_bootstrap_users_columns.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute bondfire-local --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=./db/migrations/2026-02-22_zk_everything.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute bondfire-local --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --file=./db/migrations/2026-03-25_studio_zk.sql
